test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 0 (total: 2)

test-case.name: NavigateBack_WithHistory_ReturnsPreviousEntry

test-case.name: NavigateForward_AtEnd_ReturnsNull

test-case.name: Push_ExceedsMaxSize_RemovesOldestEntries

failure.message: Second entry should be scene_004 String lengths are both 9. Strings differ at index 8. Expected: "scene_004" But was: "scene_005" -------------------^
